_doc.purpose: Localization companion for nsfw_ContraceptiveMedication_Emergency.json. Holds en-us entries added/updated after the source file's zh-cn text was authored, so the source file itself doesn't need to be touched again for translation-only changes.

en-us.chara_status_contraceptive_emergency_too: This character's ovulation cycle is temporarily delayed.
en-us.consumable_medicine_contraceptive_emerge: A single high-dose oral contraceptive. Taken shortly before ovulation, it delays ovulation for as long as the effect lasts; has no effect if ovulation has already occurred.
